## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Prompt/workflow/template update
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI/release automation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run lint:md`

## Output/compatibility impact

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change documented in README and CHANGELOG

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated README if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for CLI behavior (if applicable)
